title: scrophularia subsessilis
intro: Scrophularia subsessilis, also known as the yellow figwort or golden figwort, is a plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae), native to western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits associated with Scrophularia subsessilis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce stress. Scrophularia subsessilis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion for its herbal benefits, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
